channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped bike, 24th June
item.description:
Dumped bike, my previous post was closed as the problem has been resolved, no it hasn't its still there!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox in entrance of park- Penhill park, Rowley Avenue Sidcup, 24th June
item.description:
Dead Fox in entrance of park- Penhill park, Rowley Avenue Sidcup Resident advised she has reported a few times and the fox has been there since Monday- she said it smells really bad -
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen over because of brances and teeee blocking sunlight and covering Hosie, 24th June
item.description:
Due to being in a blue badge holder and I am disabled I have fallen over on the steps and branches that keep falling into my garden. And Green I can’t get out to my car. It shows a mobility car due to the risk of these trees they need to all be printed back. I have no Son 💙 in my house and it’s dangerous to walk around. I also have a son of SEN child who has fallen due to branches

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, St Paul's Wood Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Curb edging, 24th June
item.description:
Curb edging has come away on the drop curb, corner of Sunset Gardens and Cypress Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Cypress Road, South Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers left, 24th June
item.description:
The pavement had fresh tarmac laid a couple of weeks ago and the barriers and cones have been left behind, can they be cleared so the parking space can be used again? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Approach, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees blocking traffic lights, 24th June
item.description:
Trees blocking traffic lights

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hous gutter faces out, 24th June
item.description:
2 Coleman road front drive and house gutter rain water from they roof comes on public pavement u can see their gutter faceing towards pavments
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paroma Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of bin liners full of rubbish, 24th June
item.description:
Loads of rubbish piled up on the upper level of Baynard House near the totem pole statue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Queen Victoria Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are two damaged bins, 24th June
item.description:
Two damaged bins on Thurston Road, one recycling and one commercial - keep getting filled with residential and fly tipping. I did email Lewisham council commercial wate about getting bins repaired but haven't heard anything back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurston Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light permanently 'on', 24th June
Abandoned red Audi TT, 24th June
item.description:
Car not moved in months and has no MOT.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Milestone Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike parked on road, 24th June
item.description:
It’s literally been parked on the double yellows in a blind spot as people cycle past the roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 24th June
item.description:
Broken glass outside of 83 Whitebeam Ave. Please can this be cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitebeam Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish being dumped at the back of houses, 24th June
item.description:
More rubbish is being added to existing rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Betsham Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in alley between Albury street and Deptford church street, 24th June
item.description:
The rubbish has accumulated over many months, could yiu please clear and put this alley on regular cleaning rota
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creek Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Czech Pub - Address: 74 W End Ln, London NW6 2LX, 24th June
item.description:
A car reversed into the lampost very fast, and the speed sign dropped down and off the post from its fixture, and is now hanging upside down. It is potentially dangerous as could fall off, and it's definitely loose.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159, West End Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous Rats circulating close to Commercial Waste bins, 24th June
item.description:
Numerous Rats circulating close to Commercial Waste bins/Running in & out of a Bin area with wooden slated door.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gillett Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items in alley, 24th June
item.description:
Flat screen tv/ table parts dumped in alleyway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Red Lion Lane, Plumstead

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 24th June
item.description:
Builders waste in 3 rubbish bags left on the road outside 33 Godwin Road - blocking parking bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Godwin Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely large & deep pothole, 24th June
item.description:
It has gotten bigger very quickly. Extremely dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
